---
title: "The Voyage of the ‘Fox’ in the Arctic: A Narrative of the Discovery of the Fate of Sir John Franklin and his Companions"
---

## The Voyage of the ‘Fox’ in the Arctic: A Narrative of the Discovery of the Fate of Sir John Franklin and his Companions

**Author:** Sir Francis M’Clintock
**Date:** 1859
**Imprint:** London: Murray

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
